role_or_actor_class: Viewer, Planner, Buyer, Sales, Quality, Manufacturing, Maintenance, Supplier/Customer portal actor as scoped
state_or_guard_context: tenant/site/root visibility and saved view context
object_level_rule: must filter objects by tenant/site/root/record grants before pagination/count/facet
property_level_rule: field allowlist for facets, saved views, export previews and AI context
function_level_rule: read function grant independent of route visibility
sod_or_qualification_rule: qualification usually not required except regulated/sensitive data read policy
tenant_site_boundary: tenant and site boundary mandatory; no cross-tenant inference
evidence_or_signature_rule: regulated read audit only when policy requires
frontend_contract: read-only screen/table/facet/export drawer; hide/redact unauthorized fields
backend_decision: return authorized projection only; never return hidden ids in facets/counts
owner: Identity Access Owner + Data Authority Owner
acceptance_gate: all read endpoints have consumer/internal reason and redaction policy
stop_rule: block if query/facet/export leaks hidden data

role_or_actor_class: Root Viewer, Record Owner, Auditor, Integration Service Actor as scoped
state_or_guard_context: record visibility, released/archived status, retention policy
object_level_rule: record id authorization must run before data load/related links
function_level_rule: record-shell access grant independent of workspace projection
sod_or_qualification_rule: auditor access may require read-audit and purpose
evidence_or_signature_rule: packet export requires evidence/retention visibility plan
idempotency_requirement: not mutation-bearing; packet generation command would require key if later implemented
frontend_contract: record shell shows disabled action reasons and visibility warnings
backend_decision: return authority-aware record response concept with safe related links
acceptance_gate: record shell/action context can be rendered safely
stop_rule: block if workspace can bypass authoritative record shell

state_or_guard_context: current state, actor relation, audit/evidence visibility
object_level_rule: workflow history visible only for authorized records
function_level_rule: workflow read grant separate from command grant
sod_or_qualification_rule: SoD history visible to approver only as policy allows
frontend_contract: workflow panel shows allowed actions and disabled reasons
backend_decision: return visible state, history and guard checklist only
acceptance_gate: workflow panel can explain commands without enabling unsafe action
stop_rule: block if history leaks restricted signer/evidence details

role_or_actor_class: Creator role by domain: Sales/Buyer/Planner/Quality/Manufacturing/Maintenance/Integration Proposal Actor
state_or_guard_context: draft/proposed state only; no hidden authority; dependency root references approved/current where required
object_level_rule: actor must be allowed to create within root/site/tenant and target value stream
property_level_rule: only writable fields accepted; server ignores/rejects unauthorized properties
function_level_rule: create command grant required even if list/read allowed
sod_or_qualification_rule: qualification/SoD if regulated or shopfloor operation
evidence_or_signature_rule: scope_contract/evidence required for regulated create if policy says so
idempotency_requirement: idempotency key required; key scoped to actor/tenant/site/root/command/payload
concurrency_requirement: creation dedup by client command id and natural business identity policy
frontend_contract: create modal disabled until dependencies and required reason/evidence complete
backend_decision: reject duplicate/conflicting creation; create only via canonical root
acceptance_gate: create command has root/workflow binding and duplicate authority rule
stop_rule: block create if duplicate/natural identity policy absent

role_or_actor_class: Record Owner, Planner, Quality Engineer, Buyer/Sales owner as root-specific
state_or_guard_context: draft/proposed -> submitted/review state; guard checklist complete
object_level_rule: submit actor must own or be assigned record
sod_or_qualification_rule: qualification may be required for regulated/process roots
evidence_or_signature_rule: missing evidence/reason blocks submit when required
concurrency_requirement: current record and workflow state/version required
frontend_contract: submit action disabled until guard checklist has no blockers
acceptance_gate: B workflow guard binding available or pending gate explicit
stop_rule: block if submit command lacks workflow guard evidence matrix
notes: B outputs pending; use archetype assumptions

role_or_actor_class: Reviewer, Quality Engineer, Engineering Reviewer, Supplier Quality Reviewer
state_or_guard_context: submitted/in-review state; reviewer assignment; independent review where needed
object_level_rule: reviewer must be assigned or role-authorized for object/site/root
property_level_rule: review comments and verdict fields writable only by reviewer
sod_or_qualification_rule: SoD if reviewer cannot be creator/owner; qualification if regulated
evidence_or_signature_rule: review evidence/rationale required for regulated review
concurrency_requirement: current workflow state and assignment version required
frontend_contract: review button disabled for creator/self-review conflicts; show required reviewer
stop_rule: block if self-review could approve regulated decision

role_or_actor_class: Approver, QA Approver, Engineering Approver, Customer/Supplier approver as scoped
state_or_guard_context: reviewed/ready-for-approval state; evidence complete; SoD satisfied
property_level_rule: approval comments/reason/signature fields only as policy allows
sod_or_qualification_rule: strict SoD and qualification check; delegation evidence if used
evidence_or_signature_rule: approval evidence and signature may be required
idempotency_requirement: idempotency key required and binds approver/reason/evidence
concurrency_requirement: record/workflow/evidence version and signature challenge freshness required
frontend_contract: approve/sign controls disabled until SoD/evidence/signature prerequisites pass
backend_decision: deny until all guard, evidence, signature and concurrency conditions pass
stop_rule: block approve if signature meaning or audit manifestation absent

role_or_actor_class: Release Owner, QA Release, Manufacturing/Engineering Release Authority
state_or_guard_context: approved/ready state; all release criteria complete; validation package where applicable
property_level_rule: released fields become immutable; release packet properties controlled
idempotency_requirement: idempotency key required; exact replay returns release status only
frontend_contract: release button disabled until packet/evidence/signature complete
backend_decision: create immutable release decision; no direct edit after release
acceptance_gate: release packet and immutability policy approved
stop_rule: block release if validation/evidence/signature/rollback policy missing
notes: C05/C06/C07 must later bind release packet/event/handoff

role_or_actor_class: Root Owner, Quality/Compliance Owner, Supervisor, Admin only as policy allows
object_level_rule: actor must have correction/void authority for record
property_level_rule: only correction fields allowed; original audit preserved
sod_or_qualification_rule: SoD/signature may apply for regulated roots
idempotency_requirement: new idempotency key required for new business intent; do not reuse failed key with changed reason
frontend_contract: void/revise/close disabled unless reason/evidence/correction path exists
backend_decision: never silently delete; use governed void/revise/correction with audit
stop_rule: block if delete/void lacks audit and reason

role_or_actor_class: Evidence Owner, Root Owner, Quality/Compliance user, Integration Service Actor as scoped
state_or_guard_context: evidence type, retention, integrity, visibility, source and root record state
object_level_rule: evidence object and root record both visible and linkable
property_level_rule: evidence metadata visibility and retention fields protected
function_level_rule: evidence link grant separate from root command grant
sod_or_qualification_rule: qualification may apply for lab/inspection/training evidence
evidence_or_signature_rule: approved evidence object, retention rule and integrity reference required
idempotency_requirement: evidence-link idempotency key binds evidence reference/hash/root/record
concurrency_requirement: record version and evidence version/hash required
frontend_contract: evidence link action disabled until evidence type/policy complete
backend_decision: create immutable link/reference only; evidence authority not cloned by root service
stop_rule: block transition if evidence type/retention not approved
notes: C05 owns final evidence authority ledger

role_or_actor_class: Signer, QA Approver, Release Authority, Training Acknowledger
state_or_guard_context: signature meaning, record version, evidence set, signer identity, challenge and SoD
object_level_rule: signer must be authorized for exact root/action/state/meaning
function_level_rule: signature execution grant separate from approve/read
sod_or_qualification_rule: SoD and qualification mandatory where policy requires
idempotency_requirement: signature idempotency key binds signer/meaning/record version/evidence set
concurrency_requirement: record/evidence/workflow version must match at execution time
frontend_contract: signature modal shows meaning/version/evidence/reason; no generic approve button
backend_decision: reject if challenge, meaning, SoD, evidence or concurrency fails
acceptance_gate: signature policy catalog row exists and signer authority proven
stop_rule: block e-sign if meaning/audit link missing

role_or_actor_class: Authorized collaborator, reviewer, owner, auditor as policy allows
state_or_guard_context: record visible; comment purpose; regulated audit implications
object_level_rule: commenter must have record collaboration scope
function_level_rule: comment add grant distinct from read
sod_or_qualification_rule: regulated comment may require reason classification
evidence_or_signature_rule: regulated rationale may become audit/evidence reference
idempotency_requirement: comment add idempotency key or anti-duplicate token required for mutation
concurrency_requirement: record version/context captured; comment does not mutate authority unless policy states
frontend_contract: comment box disabled if record not visible/closed/audit hold
backend_decision: append-only comment/audit behavior; no silent edit/delete
stop_rule: block comment mutation if retention/delete policy absent

state_or_guard_context: record/evidence visible; file policy and retention scope
sod_or_qualification_rule: qualification may apply to lab/evidence files
evidence_or_signature_rule: scan/integrity/retention/evidence type required before evidence link
idempotency_requirement: attachment command idempotency binds file hash/reference
frontend_contract: upload/link disabled until policy allows; quarantine state visible

role_or_actor_class: Authorized Viewer, Auditor, Customer/Supplier Portal, Quality/Compliance
state_or_guard_context: purpose, retention, privacy, packet scope, released state
object_level_rule: only export records actor can see
property_level_rule: data minimization and field redaction mandatory
function_level_rule: export function grant distinct from read
sod_or_qualification_rule: regulated packet may require audit purpose
idempotency_requirement: planned export is read-only; actual export job later needs idempotency if mutation/loggable
concurrency_requirement: snapshot/freshness marker and packet version required
frontend_contract: export drawer shows redaction/missing evidence warnings
backend_decision: return plan/options only in C04; no file generation
acceptance_gate: export plan states fields, purpose, retention and consumer
stop_rule: block export if restricted fields can leak

role_or_actor_class: Integration Service Actor, Partner Portal Actor, Root Owner Reconciler
state_or_guard_context: source system trust, mapping, payload hash, replay id, tenant/site/root mapping
object_level_rule: source actor can propose only allowed roots/objects
property_level_rule: external payload fields mapped/filtered by property policy
function_level_rule: apply/reconcile function grant separate from receive/quarantine
evidence_or_signature_rule: payload snapshot evidence required for governed apply
concurrency_requirement: external version/source timestamp and internal record version compared
frontend_contract: integration review drawer with quarantine/conflict states
backend_decision: quarantine until trusted mapping and authority decision
acceptance_gate: C07 source-of-truth and mapping policy approved

role_or_actor_class: Integration Service Actor, Event Bus, Notification Owner
state_or_guard_context: command outcome exists; outbox/event plan; data minimization
object_level_rule: source record visible/eligible for outbound action
property_level_rule: payload fields minimized and authorized for recipient
sod_or_qualification_rule: regulated send may require release/approval state
evidence_or_signature_rule: outbound payload snapshot/audit evidence if governed
concurrency_requirement: event/outbox version preserved; no duplicate business mutation
backend_decision: send/retry via outbox; do not repeat domain command
stop_rule: block if outbound retry can duplicate business mutation

role_or_actor_class: Operator, Supervisor, Maintenance Technician, OT Gateway Actor
state_or_guard_context: work order/operation/equipment/material state, qualification, safety interlock, freshness window
function_level_rule: MES/OT action grant distinct from read
sod_or_qualification_rule: operator qualification, LOTO/safety, equipment status mandatory
idempotency_requirement: offline/online command idempotency key and device sequence required
frontend_contract: start/complete/consume buttons disabled on stale signal/interlock/qualification gap
backend_decision: deny/quarantine unsafe or stale operational command
acceptance_gate: C08 offline/edge policy approved before mutation
stop_rule: block OT write path until safety/offline/freshness policy is approved

role_or_actor_class: Authorized Viewer, Domain Expert, AI Reviewer, Human Authority Actor
state_or_guard_context: intended use, data visibility, confidence/uncertainty, human authority boundary
object_level_rule: AI context only includes records actor can see
property_level_rule: AI context excludes hidden properties; citations/evidence links visible only if authorized
function_level_rule: AI advisory read grant distinct from controlled command accept/reject
evidence_or_signature_rule: rationale/evidence required for human acceptance where governed
idempotency_requirement: AI recommendation id is not command id; human action needs its own idempotency key
concurrency_requirement: human acceptance requires current record/workflow version; stale AI advice cannot mutate
frontend_contract: AI panel labels advisory; accept/reject buttons use human command rules
backend_decision: never let AI execute authority mutation directly
acceptance_gate: AI advisory boundary and human authority gate approved

role_or_actor_class: Platform Admin, Security Admin, Compliance Admin, Root Authority Admin
state_or_guard_context: configuration state, change-control, validation package where relevant
object_level_rule: admin can act only within tenant/platform boundary and approved admin area
function_level_rule: admin function grant explicit; never inferred from URL
evidence_or_signature_rule: change-control/validation evidence required for regulated/security-sensitive config
frontend_contract: admin screen shows change-control and validation blockers
backend_decision: reject if config/policy change lacks approval and evidence
notes: C03 alias gap review rows included
